name: Broccoli Dijon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli according to package directions (use fresh) until tender crisp.
2. Drain well.
3. In a small bowl, cream the butter and add mustard and lemon juice.
4. Add the mustard mixture to the broccoli in the pan.
5. Heat until melted.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Toss well and serve.
